raw_consumer_statement: Submitted a dispute with Citi for a defective item that I tried troubleshooting with company, they were not responsive to requests. Ended up returning bicycle, but Citi closed the case stating that I am responsible for payment. They never requested any evidence from my side, even though they said to keep all evidence available. I have been calling Citi every three days, and they say the same thing : I will reopen your case, please check again in three days. I have done this during two weeks and the charge continues to be on my account, and no clear guidance on next steps.
